Package org.eventb.internal.core.tool

Class ModuleDesc<T extends IModule>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.BasicDesc
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.BasicDescWithClass
org.eventb.internal.core.tool.ModuleDesc<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IModuleType<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
FilterModuleDesc, ProcessorModuleDesc
public abstract class ModuleDesc<T extends IModule> extends BasicDescWithClass implements IModuleType<T>
Description of a module (filter or processor) registered with the module manager.

Implements lazy class loading for the executable extension.
